title: DupeChest (Duplication Chest/Dupe Chest)
description: This mod adds a chest that duplicates/mirror the contents of your inventory. Infinite resources await, but only for those who conquer the end-game.
body:
![DupeChest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f7d6f5d135d054f58025deb0771db40c588ea06.png)

# 📦 DupeChest

**DupeChest** is a high-tier expansion that introduces the ultimate reality-bending utility to your Minecraft world. Rewriting the laws of the matrix, this mod allows you to duplicate your most precious items—at a legendary cost.

## 🌌 What's in the Mod

The mod centers around the **Dupe Chest**, a custom block entity designed for end-game progression:

* **The Dupe Chest**: A unique storage block that duplicates items placed within it.
* **Short on resources?** Missing that one piece of Redstone for a torch? Just dupe it!
* **Left your stash behind?** Forgot your 67 stacks of Emerald Blocks at home? Don't worry, just dupe 'em!
* **NBT Support**: It copies *everything*, including items with **NBT data**—meaning you can clone fully Enchanted Books and even entire Shulker Boxes!

![Function](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a3f60e842af7dffffffe1e5527ca8e23a3a46ac.gif)

## 🛠️ Crafting & Progression

To prevent world-breaking imbalances, the Dupe Chest requires a massive 9-item shapeless recipe consisting of the rarest artifacts in the game:

![recipeGif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d530dd35f0544d7f1cc52036e8f946de9d2f7332.gif)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7812cc8562b0212674a0f40503966254bf86ac1.png)

* **Ingredients**: Dragon Egg, Dragon Head, Mace, Silence Armor Trim, Music Disc (Pigstep), Conduit, Creeper Head, Piglin Head, and an Enchanted Golden Apple.
* **Recipe Book**: As soon as you obtain a **Dragon Egg**, the recipe will automatically unlock in your green recipe book.

## 🚀 Getting Started

To begin your journey into the matrix, you must defeat the strongest bosses and raid the deepest structures to gather the 9 required components. Once crafted, place the chest and witness the laws of reality rewrite themselves.

## 💬 Join the Conversation

Found a bug or have a suggestion?

* **Report Issues**: Use our GitHub Issues tracker to let us know.
* **View Source**: This project is open source! Check out the logic behind the duplication on our **GitHub Repository**.

## 🤝 Contributing

Looking to contribute? **DupeChest** is open source, and we welcome the community to help refine the matrix.

* **Code Contributions**: We accept bug fixes and feature improvements via Pull Requests.
* **Building From Source**: Clone the repo and run `gradlew build` to generate your own build files.
